_comment: Expected Semgrep findings when run standalone against muaddib-simulation

findings.message: Detected use of exec(). Use of exec can lead to code injection.
exec() called with base64-decoded input — possible code injection

limitations: exec() detection flags legitimate metaprogramming and plugin loaders
Cannot determine if code inside exec() payload is actually malicious
SSL disable is common in dev/test tools (false positive heavy)
File path access detection has no context about what happens with the data
No correlation between credential read and network exfiltration
